info.faq1A: Select accommodation on the website, click "Book" and complete the payment.
info.faq2A: Yes, you can cancel a booking according to the selected property's rules.
info.faq3A: You can pay by Visa, MasterCard or online banking.
info.supportText: Have questions or need help? We are always here!
info.aboutText: Heartland Homes is an accommodation booking service that connects people with cozy properties across Ukraine. We strive to make travel accessible and comfortable for everyone.
info.cozyHomesDesc: Choose from hundreds of verified accommodation options.
info.affordablePricesDesc: We offer options for any budget.
info.easyBookingDesc: A quick and simple search and booking process.
info.popularText: Choose a destination for your next trip from the most popular cities and regions.
info.kyivDesc: The capital with countless vacation options
info.lvivDesc: History, coffee and an incredible atmosphere
info.partnersText: We partner with reliable companies to provide you with the best experience.
info.termsText: By using our service, you agree to the terms of use, booking rules and cancellation policy.
info.terms1: You are required to provide accurate information when booking.
info.terms2: It is forbidden to rent accommodation without the owner's confirmation.
info.terms3: We reserve the right to change the terms...
info.privacyText1: We respect your privacy and care about the security of your personal data. No information is shared with third parties without your consent.
info.privacyText2: You can contact us at any time to delete or change your data.
info.cookiesText: We use cookies to improve your website experience.

offers.title: Offers & Discounts
offers.subtitle: Check out current offers to make your trips more affordable.
offers.offer1Desc: Save up to 20% with Seasonal Offer
offers.offer1Details: This offer is available only during the season! Discounts on the best accommodations in popular cities.
offers.offer2Title: Dream living in a vacation home
offers.offer2Desc: Choose from houses, villas, chalets and more.
offers.offer2Details: Special selection of vacation homes - from cozy chalets to luxurious villas.
offers.offer3Desc: Explore the world and find unforgettable accommodations.
offers.offer3Details: Travel with us and discover new destinations. We've gathered the best offers for you.
offers.offer4Details: For every booking made this month, receive bonuses that can be used for future trips.
offers.summerDiscountDesc: Valid for all apartments until the end of August.
offers.longTermRentalDesc: Rent accommodation for 14+ days and get a better price.
